description: Whether agents can have their own MCP server configuration, scoping which external tools each agent can access.

claude-code.mechanism: mcpServers frontmatter field: list of server names referencing already-configured workspace servers or inline server definitions

codex.mechanism: MCP configuration is workspace-wide; no per-role MCP scoping mechanism

copilot-cli.mechanism: mcp-servers inline config in frontmatter; available for cloud agent only; workspace MCP config shared by default

kiro.mechanism: inline mcpServers map per agent config; includeMcpJson boolean controls whether workspace .kiro/mcp.json is merged into agent's server set

windsurf.mechanism: AGENTS.md has no structured config; MCP is workspace-wide only, not per-agent
